metadata.dc:title: Latin America Population Age Structure Dataset (19 countries, 1995-2030)
metadata.dc:creator: Juan Moisés de la Serna Tuya
Juan Moisés de la Serna Tuya
metadata.dc:description: Harmonized demographic dataset: population age structure in Latin America (19 countries, 1995-2030). 228 records, 41 variables. Covers age groups 0-14, 15-64, 65+ with absolute counts, percentages, dependency ratios, aging index, and median age. Source: CEPALSTAT/ECLAC. Version 1.1.0. DOI: 10.17632/ygkmshr5fv.1
metadata.dc:subject: Latin America, population age structure, demographic transition, aging, CEPALSTAT, ECLAC, dependency ratio, open data

datacite:contributor.datacite:contributorName: Juan Moisés de la Serna Tuya
